title: ICC Rankings
description: Full-stack ICC cricket points tracker covering 1973–2025, with a Google-authenticated AI chatbot that answers natural language questions over live tournament data.
long_description: ICC Rankings tracks cumulative team points across every ICC format — Men's and Women's World Cups, T20s, Test Championship, and age-group events from 1973 to 2025. A Rust/Axum API serves the historical data; a Next.js frontend renders rankings, team breakdowns, and event pages. Authentication is handled via Google OAuth (NextAuth), with JWT claims carrying role and new-user state so the chatbot delivers personalised sessions. The centrepiece is Twelfth Man, an AI chatbot built on LangGraph and Claude that routes natural language queries through a multi-node agent: classifying intent, running read-only SQL, executing sandboxed Pandas analytics, and formatting the response with optional inline charts.
highlights: 6-node LangGraph agent: Router classifies intent and branches to SQL Agent, Analytics, Greeting, or Off-topic nodes before Formatter
Rust/Axum API auto-seeds 52 years of ICC tournament data (1973–2025) across 5 formats on first boot
Google OAuth via NextAuth — JWT carries is_admin and is_new_user claims, enabling per-user chat history isolation in MongoDB
Read-only PostgreSQL guardrails + sandboxed Pandas code execution keep the chatbot safe against injection and runaway queries

diagrams.title: Twelfth Man LangGraph Query Flow
diagrams.content:
graph TD
    MSG([User Message]) --> ROUTER{Router\nHaiku}
    ROUTER -->|sql_query| SQL[SQL Agent\nSonnet]
    ROUTER -->|analytics| ANA[Analytics\nSonnet + Pandas]
    ROUTER -->|greeting| GREET[Greeting]
    ROUTER -->|off_topic| OT[Off Topic]
    ROUTER -->|clarification| END([END])
    SQL --> FMT[Formatter\nHaiku]
    ANA --> FMT
    FMT --> RESP([Response])
    GREET --> RESP
    OT --> RESP
    classDef router fill:#7e22ce,color:#fff,stroke:#3b0764
    classDef agent fill:#1d4ed8,color:#fff,stroke:#1e3a8a
    classDef formatter fill:#065f46,color:#fff,stroke:#064e3b
    classDef terminal fill:#374151,color:#fff,stroke:#1f2937
    class ROUTER router
    class SQL,ANA agent
    class FMT formatter
    class MSG,RESP,END,GREET,OT terminal

diagrams.title: ICC Rankings System Architecture
diagrams.content:
graph TD
    subgraph Frontend
        Browser[User Browser] --> Web[Next.js 14\n:5237]
    end
    subgraph Backend
        Web --> API[Rust / Axum API\n:7429]
        Web --> Bot[Twelfth Man Chatbot\nFastAPI + LangGraph :8100]
    end
    subgraph Data
        API --> PG[(PostgreSQL\nICC historical data)]
        Bot --> PG
        Bot --> Mongo[(MongoDB\nChat history)]
    end
    subgraph External
        Bot --> Claude[Claude API\nHaiku + Sonnet]
        API --> Lambda[AWS Lambda\nECR container]
        Bot --> Lambda
    end
    classDef frontend fill:#7e22ce,color:#fff,stroke:#3b0764
    classDef service fill:#1d4ed8,color:#fff,stroke:#1e3a8a
    classDef data fill:#065f46,color:#fff,stroke:#064e3b
    classDef external fill:#92400e,color:#fff,stroke:#78350f
    class Browser,Web frontend
    class API,Bot service
    class PG,Mongo data
    class Claude,Lambda external
